Machine Learning for Electrochemical Image Processing
  • Machine Learning for Electrochemical Image Processing

Machine Learning for Electrochemical Image Processing

A hands-on tutorial on machine-learning-based image processing for electrochemical and scientific microscopy data.

Event: DPG 2026, AKPIK Session — Dresden, March 2026

Developer

Amir Omidvarnia (Forschungszentrum Jülich)
